_meta.purpose: Static physical-attributes store. Physical facts (square footage) are immutable per unit — modeled once, kept static, never re-scraped daily. Pricing/availability come from the daily scrape; SF is merged from here at ingest. The store auto-grows: any building whose feed publishes SF records it here on every run, so coverage improves over time with zero extra effort.
_meta.policy: sqft_for(building, unit): exact unit SF if known; else, for buildings with a line_pattern, the unit's stack-line SF; else blank. learn(): every listing that arrives WITH sqft is recorded here.
_meta.journal_method: The Journal publishes exact per-unit SF only inside a Yardi/RentCafe feed (React server-component payload, exposed per-unit on the 'View' click). Harvested once 2026-06-11 (119 units) rather than clicked daily. New units inherit SF from their stack line via line_pattern.

sf_source.comment: 2026-06-11: 505 + The Journal read per-unit SF from their Yardi/RentCafe React feed at every pull (fiber merge in scrape.py) — both in_feed. How each building's SF can be recorded — drives the per-building completeness tracker. in_feed = publishes per-unit SF in its availability feed (store auto-grows as units list); line_modeled = exact harvest + a stack-line map that covers every unit (effectively complete); none = no machine-readable SF (floor-plan images only) so it can never be recorded by scraping.
